description: A stacked set of disclosure panels using the native details/summary elements.

description: Copy the entire ZUI source directly into your project for full ownership and customisation.

description: ZUI uses @layer to organise styles into a predictable cascade, making overrides straightforward without specificity battles.
title: CSS Layers

description: ZUI is CSS-first — use its classes directly with any framework that doesn't have a first-party wrapper.

description: ZUI ships first-party React components with type-safe props and variant support out of the box.

description: An AI agent skill giving coding assistants deep knowledge of ZUI's components, tokens, and conventions.

description: ZUI ships first-party Svelte 5 components with typed props and variant support out of the box.

description: Five live CodePen demos — identical ZUI markup, radically different looks. Only the :root custom properties change.

description: Build a command menu (⌘K palette) and style its unstyled parts with ZUI's tokens.

description: Pre-built animation tokens combining keyframes with easing and duration. Apply via the animation property.

description: A structured z-index scale with wide gaps between layers to avoid collisions.

description: Flexbox utility classes for layout, alignment, and distribution.

description: Rich text styling for long-form content — typography, spacing, and element styles in one class.
